Fluoride-free toothpaste can sufficiently protect against tooth decay and remineralise tooth enamel. With repeated use, it strengthens the tooth enamel and forms a protective layer on it. In addition, your teeth will shine naturally. Individuals with a higher incidence of tooth decay will be pleased with the higher percentage of added substances that prevent bacteria from multiplying and thus reduce tooth decay. The volume of KAREX toothpaste is 65 ml. The menthol flavour adds an attractive touch to brushing your teeth. For the health of your teeth, a bright white smile and fresh breath, it's best to use KAREX toothpaste and the right toothbrush. Key benefits of KAREX Junior...

items.raw_desc: Fogkrém Sensodyne Repair&Protect Extra Fresh fogkrém 75 ml:Hogyan javítja és védi fogaidat a SENSODYNE Repair & Protect Extra Fresh fogkrém?Az új SENSODYNE Repair & Protect Extra Fresh fogkrémre bátran rábízhatod a fogaid problémamentes ápolását.
